en: -♪ Friends Challenge, oh, yeah! ♪
Here's how the game works. You draw a question from the Best Friends box.
Then the other person guesses how they think you would answer that question.
We'll see how many we can get right. Ariana, why don't you draw the first question?
Okay. Do I...
Yeah, you can. Yes, you ask the question. I don't want to. Okay.
If I could be any animal, what animal would I be?
Oh, so this is you guessing what I would be. If I could be any animal, which one would I be?
And I write the real answer. Yeah.
You might write the real answer, too. I know you, so...
Any animal. What animal would you be?
Okay. Show your answer to that camera. I won't look.
Okay. Do you show it?
Wait, that sounds like the audience was surprised there.
Okay, um... My answer is...
a kitty cat! Oh, that's a good one.
A seahorse! What the hell are you talking about?
I don't know. Seahorse? I love them. I thought you were wearing, like, bunny ears.
You wear cat ears all the time. No, you're right. You're right. Like a kitty cat.
Okay, all right. You get that one anyway. Seahorse? Seahorse.
I'm kind of like... That was close. But they can't wear, like, seahorse ears. Like, what are those?
Like... No, I wouldn't say you have to dress... But, I mean, you kind of hinted that you like...
I know. I'm sorry, man. I don't know. No, we're good. We're good. I really misled you. I apologize.
No, here we go. We're good. We're good, all right? Ready? Okay. Whew.
What food do I hate the most? Ooh.
Ooh, I don't know. There you go.
I'm putting the vibes out there. ♪♪♪♪
-♪♪♪♪ Barf. Just writing it.
All right, I'm going to show my answer. Don't look. Ready?
Oh, you didn't write yet. You just got it? You know, because I...
Go ahead. You got my vibe? All right, you got my vibe on that one.
I think maybe. Okay, this is great. All right. Go ahead. You go. Don't look. Ready?
Blurf. Blurf.
I looked. I tried to look, but I'm blind, so it doesn't... I can't see, so it didn't work.
Let's see what your answer was. Mustard.
What? Mustard?
Mustard is so delicious. It's yellow.
It's got, like, spices in it. It's vinegary. Mayonnaise.
You know why I don't like it? It reminds me of pus. Yeah, I don't like it, either.
Oh, stop it. Yeah, everyone loves it.
All right, this is upsetting. I was close, though. You were very close. It was a condiment.
We're in the condiment family. Yeah, you're right. I mean, mustard, all right, good. All right, ready?
This is the one we're going to get. I know it right here. You pick one. Oh, my turn. Yeah, yeah. Here we go.
I'll guess this one. Okay. Mayonnaise. Who...
Oh, this is a good one. Who was my first celebrity crush?
It's a little embarrassing.
A little embarrassing here if it's, you know,
you have to actually write it down.
I mean, everyone kind of knows who it could be.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
Oh, this is a good one. All right, you show it to your guys.
Maybe I'll show mine first. Okay, yeah, go ahead.
Ready? Don't look.
All right, I'm going to show yours.
Is that bad?
Let me show you something.
First celebrity crush, Jim Carrey.
Very close. I was very close.
This is the one that counts. All right.
Are you all right? What is my most embarrassing bad habit?
Why did you write it that fast? Like, all the other ones, you really thought about it.
You know, and then this one, you just look at it. You're writing, like, three sentences.
Oh, my gosh.
All right, I'm going to show mine first.
Should I show mine first? Yeah, yeah, yeah. Go ahead.
This embarrassing bad habit is laugh.
I'm like, I laugh too much. No, I like your laugh. You're good in that department.
This was the one.
That's right, because I'm your second crush.
I got you, girl. Ariana Grande, everybody.
